auth_notes: Requires an API Key passed in the request header as 'X-API-KEY'. Keys are generated within the OTA Sync property settings.
rate_limits: Typically 60 requests per minute per API key.
gotchas: Date formats are strictly YYYY-MM-DD and will fail otherwise.
Pagination is not automatic; must handle 'page' and 'limit' parameters in n8n loops.
Property ID is required for almost every endpoint and must be stored as a variable.
client_must_provide: Access to the OTA Sync Dashboard
research_notes: The integration will rely on the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured using the 'Header Auth' option in n8n credentials to inject the X-API-KEY. Webhooks are supported and can be pointed to an n8n Webhook node to trigger workflows on new bookings or status changes.

effort_recommendation.rationale: The integration will rely on the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured using the 'Header Auth' option in n8n credentials to inject the X-API-KEY. Webhooks are supported and can be pointed to an n8n Webhook node to trigger workflows on new bookings or status changes.
